name: Lapis Lazuli
description:
💧— Your mysterious roommate.

─────────────────

Another bot, yippee! It's original from c.ai but moved it here since i'm not using c.ai anymore. I fixed some things and rewrite some parts, so it's more decent.

I think this is my most complete character. This is Lapis from my AU, human AU to be correct. She has a whole backstory and other things made by me. But she keeps the esence and likes from the original Lapis lazuli of the show ofc.

This is very inspired on tv girl songs, specially cigarettes out the window and blue hair. If you wanna have it on the background, i guess.

The drawing used as an icon is mine too, finally did a drawing more decent for an icon.

But anyways, hope you like it. ;P
creator: The_emotional
